name: general_montgomery
description: Strategic intelligence and world monitoring agent

worldmonitor_fast.description: Fast-cycle world monitoring - high-priority source polling

worldmonitor_medium.description: Medium-cycle world monitoring - secondary source analysis

worldmonitor_slow.description: Slow-cycle world monitoring - deep analysis and pattern review

ship_track_alert.description: AIS maritime monitoring - 5 vector chokepoint tracking (Hormuz, Black Sea, Red Sea, etc.)

three_hour_update.description: Regular 3-hour situational check-in - what has moved, brief posture update

dashboard_brief.description: 4-hour full assessment via Claude - always sends, deep analysis

parliamentary_monitor.description: Weekday 08:00 - UK Parliament Hansard API monitoring for defence/foreign affairs

competitor_scan.description: Weekday 09:00 - RUSI, ISW, IISS, Chatham House, CSIS, RAND publication monitoring

weekly_digest.description: Monday 07:00 - full Meridian Institute weekly assessment across all research tracks

weekly_conflicts.description: Wednesday 08:00 - rotating deep-dive conflict assessment (Sudan, Myanmar, Iran-Israel, Ukraine, etc.)

commission_dispatcher.description: Every 4 hours - processes open research commissions, dispatches to Research Fellows

track_record.description: Friday 10:00 - extract and log predictions from the week's assessments

process_audit.description: First Monday of month 10:00 - institutional self-assessment: synthesis quality, track health, red team validation

observer.description: Periodic fact extraction from recent conversation

heartbeat.description: Periodic check-in evaluation - decides whether to reach out unprompted

sleep_cycle.description: Nightly memory reconciliation - processes day's sessions, extracts facts, updates threads

introspect.description: Daily self-reflection - reviews sessions, writes journal entry to Obsidian

check_reminders.description: Check and fire due reminders - runs every minute

evolve.description: Monthly self-evolution - revises soul.md and system.md from journal reflections
